title: Hazardous Materials Removal Workers
description: Identify, remove, pack, transport, or dispose of hazardous materials, including asbestos, lead-based paint, waste oil, fuel, transmission fluid, radioactive materials, or contaminated soil. Specialized training and certification in hazardous materials handling or a confined entry permit are generally required. May operate earth-moving equipment or trucks.

tasks.text: Build containment areas prior to beginning abatement or decontamination work.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Remove asbestos or lead from surfaces, using hand or power tools such as scrapers, vacuums, or high-pressure sprayers.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Identify asbestos, lead, or other hazardous materials to be removed, using monitoring devices.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare hazardous material for removal or storage.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Comply with prescribed safety procedures or federal laws regulating waste disposal methods.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Load or unload materials into containers or onto trucks, using hoists or forklifts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean contaminated equipment or areas for reuse, using detergents or solvents, sandblasters, filter pumps, or steam cleaners.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Remove or limit contamination following emergencies involving hazardous substances.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean mold-contaminated sites by removing damaged porous materials or thoroughly cleaning all contaminated nonporous materials.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Operate machines or equipment to remove, package, store, or transport loads of waste materials.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Record numbers of containers stored at disposal sites, specifying amounts or types of equipment or waste disposed.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Sort specialized hazardous waste at landfills or disposal centers, following proper disposal procedures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Operate cranes to move or load baskets, casks, or canisters.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Drive trucks or other heavy equipment to convey contaminated waste to designated sea or ground locations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Identify or separate waste products or materials for recycling or reuse.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Upload baskets of irradiated elements onto machines that insert fuel elements into canisters and secure lids.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Process e-waste, such as computer components containing lead or mercury.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Organize or track the locations of hazardous items in landfills.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Mix or pour concrete into forms to encase waste material for disposal.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Apply bioremediation techniques to hazardous wastes to allow naturally occurring bacteria to break down toxic substances.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Package, store, or move irradiated fuel elements in the underwater storage basins of nuclear reactor plants, using machines or equipment.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
